exception.message: Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: session not created from unknown error: cannot find msedge binary Host info: host: 'DESKTOP-0P2I782', ip: '192.168.29.28' Build info: version: '4.39.0', revision: '126f156aee' System info: os.name: 'Windows 10', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17.0.18' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.edge.EdgeDriver Command: [null, newSession {capabilities=[Capabilities {browserName: MicrosoftEdge, ms:edgeOptions: {args: [], extensions: []}}]}]
